summary: The failure-revert behavior was already implemented in cron.mjs:118-126: when runSingleFeature throws, the board item is reverted to 'ready' via setProjectItemStatus and a failure comment is posted to the GitHub issue via commentIssue. The unit test at test/cron-tick.test.mjs:193-221 ('reverts to ready and comments on failed dispatch') directly verifies both behaviors. All 547 tests pass (545 pass, 2 skipped).
